overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a rural Japanese village landscape. The character traverses from a grassy meadow down to the Nupur River, passing villagers washing clothes in the water, with snow-capped mountains and traditional thatched-roof houses in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow approaching a mountain village

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the village and river in the distance

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peaks visible through atmospheric haze in the background
dense pine trees covering the hillside behind the village
cluster of traditional thatched-roof houses with wooden frames
tall green grass with white wildflowers covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a lush grass meadow with snow-capped mountains and a traditional Japanese village visible in the distance. The atmosphere is overcast and misty, with coniferous forests covering the hillsides.

events.description: character steps from grassy bank into the shallow river water
on-screen text 'NUPUR RIVER' appears identifying the location

agents.ego_description: wading into the river and walking through shallow water toward villagers washing clothes

notable_agents.action: villager kneeling on a rock washing clothes in the river
villager bending over washing items in the water

entered.detail: clear turquoise river water with visible rocky bottom
large gray rocks protruding from the river water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Nupur River, transitioning from grass to water. Villagers are seen washing clothes on the river rocks. The traditional village remains visible on the left bank while the character wades through the clear turquoise water.

scene_state.functional_zone: river crossing with multiple villagers washing

events.description: on-screen text 'HUSKO KOTAN' appears identifying the village area

agents.ego_description: continuing through the river past groups of villagers washing clothes on the rocks

notable_agents.action: group of villagers washing clothes together on river rocks
villager washing in the water near the river bank

entered.detail: long wooden boat moored in the river downstream

segments.scene_description: The character continues wading through the Husko Kotan area of the river, passing more villagers washing clothes. A wooden fishing boat becomes visible in the distance, and the river boulders grow larger as the character approaches them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty highland meadow down into the clear, turquoise waters of a rural river valley. It begins with the character traversing a lush grass meadow under an overcast sky, with coniferous forests and snow-capped mountains framing a distant Japanese village. As the character descends, the terrain shifts from grass to water upon entering the Nupur River, where villagers are seen washing clothes on the river rocks. The scene then expands further into the Husko Kotan area, passing more villagers as the river boulders grow larger and a wooden fishing boat appears in the distance.
